relevantSections: Classification of official documents and information
Cloud security requirements for government data

classificationSystem.description: Malaysian government classification under the Official Secrets Act 1972

levels.handling: No restrictions. Can be shared publicly.
Internal government use only. Not for public disclosure.
Access limited to authorized personnel. Logged access.
levels.encryption: Mandatory encryption at rest and in transit

levels.handling: Strict need-to-know. Personal accountability for each copy.
Highest protection. Named distribution list. Continuous tracking.
levels.encryption: Government-approved encryption with HSM key management

myGovCloudRequirements.description: Government data must be stored within Malaysia. Cloud infrastructure must be within Malaysian borders.
All government data in cloud must be encrypted at rest and in transit using MAMPU-approved algorithms.
Encryption keys for SULIT and above must remain under government control (HYOK model).
Multi-factor authentication for access to government cloud resources. Security clearance verification.
Comprehensive audit logging of all access to government data with 7-year retention.
